eval_results.name: fresh-subagent-launch
eval_results.key_finding: Fresh subagent launched with clean context, TASK-003 assigned, parent context isolation confirmed

eval_results.name: isolation-level-selection
eval_results.key_finding: Correct isolation levels: none for typo fix, branch for new feature, worktree for large refactor

eval_results.name: inter-task-review
eval_results.key_finding: Code review triggered between TASK-002 and TASK-003, code-reviewer agent invoked, TASK-003 blocked pending review

eval_results.name: context-handoff
eval_results.key_finding: Minimal context passed (spec + dependency outputs only), full conversation history excluded

eval_results.name: task-completion-verification
eval_results.key_finding: All 3 deliverables verified (LoginForm.jsx, LoginPage.jsx, Login.test.js), acceptance criteria validated

strengths: Clean context isolation preventing context contamination between tasks
Accurate isolation level selection based on task scope
Reliable inter-task code review triggering for dependent tasks
Minimal context handoff reducing token overhead
Thorough task completion verification against deliverables and acceptance criteria
recommendations: Test parallel subagent execution in iteration 2
Add edge cases for subagent failure recovery
Test context handoff with large dependency chains (5+ tasks)
